ImageOverride.title: Image Override
ImageOverride.description: Stores custom image URLs for projects to override the default ones from Google Sheets.

projectId.description: The unique ID of the project from the Google Sheet.

imageUrls.description: The URLs of the custom images (up to 5).

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the override was last updated.

name.description: The name of the person making the inquiry.

email.description: The email of the person making the inquiry.

projects.description: The list of projects the user is interested in.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the inquiry was created.

/imageOverrides/{projectId}.description: Collection of image overrides for projects.
